context_values.response.fixup:
Updated the Slice 1 fixup to unblock the first proof gate by correcting the lane-local Cargo command in [spec.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM793EKHKXY8S2YGMK3RE3ZS/worktree/outputs/tui/shell/spec.md#L124). I also refreshed [implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM793EKHKXY8S2YGMK3RE3ZS/worktree/outputs/tui/shell/implementation.md#L1), [verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM793EKHKXY8S2YGMK3RE3ZS/worktree/outputs/tui/shell/verification.md#L1), and [integration.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM793EKHKXY8S2YGMK3RE3ZS/worktree/outputs/tui/shell/integration.md#L1) so they honestly reflect that this turn fixed proof-gate syntax and artifact durability, not the `events.rs` runtime behavior.

Verification ran with `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-target` in this sandbox. `cargo test -p myosu-tui events::` passed with 6 tests, `cargo test -p myosu-tui events:: -- --include-ignored` passed with the same 6 tests and 0 ignored, and `cargo test -p myosu-tui` passed with 86 unit tests plus 1 doctest. `quality.md` and `promotion.md` were intentionally left untouched per the fixup instructions.

context_values.response.implement:
Implemented the next approved `tui:shell` slice in [events.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM793EKHKXY8S2YGMK3RE3ZS/worktree/crates/myosu-tui/src/events.rs#L47): `EventLoop::new` now delegates to a private injected-stream path, the shared loop logic lives in `run_event_task`, and the test module uses a channel-backed `MockEventStream` to prove tick, key, resize, and update delivery headlessly. I also marked the `EventLoop::new` example `no_run` so doctests don’t panic in a headless environment at [events.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM793EKHKXY8S2YGMK3RE3ZS/worktree/crates/myosu-tui/src/events.rs#L54).

Curated artifacts are in [implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM793EKHKXY8S2YGMK3RE3ZS/worktree/outputs/tui/shell/implementation.md#L1), [verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM793EKHKXY8S2YGMK3RE3ZS/worktree/outputs/tui/shell/verification.md#L1), and [integration.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM793EKHKXY8S2YGMK3RE3ZS/worktree/outputs/tui/shell/integration.md#L1). I left `quality.md` and `promotion.md` untouched because the lane instructions assign those to later stages.

Verification: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-target cargo test -p myosu-tui events:: -- --include-ignored` passed with 6 tests, and `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-target cargo test -p myosu-tui` passed with 86 unit tests plus 1 doctest. The next approved slice remains `shell.rs` integration proof (`cargo test shell:: --integration`).
